channel.title: TreeStakes on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in TreeStakes on Nature Works

item.title: Robinia tree stakes
item.description:
My orchardist friend Martin Hayes is using Robinia tree stakes, apparently lasting 25 years

Very interesting to hear that Black Locust (Robinia pseudoacacia) can is long lasting (25 years) and very suitable for tree stakes. http://localhost:1313/blog/230913-robinia-tree-stakes/
